title: Gallery & Events
subtitle: Moments from hackathons, workshops, and tech community events

events.title: Machine Learning Instructional Session - Varendra University
events.description: Conducted a hands-on workshop on Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence as ML Instructor from AI Bangladesh, in collaboration with the Department of CSE, Varendra University. Received Token of Appreciation for delivering practical ML training sessions.
events.location: Department of CSE, Varendra University, Rajshahi

events.title: ICCiT 2024 Conference
events.description: Presented two research papers on sentiment analysis and health analytics at the International Conference on Computer and Information Technology

events.title: Machine Learning Fundamentals Workshop - RUET
events.description: Conducted hands-on workshop on Machine Learning fundamentals and practical implementation for students

events.title: IoT Project Exhibition
events.description: Showcased IoT-based smart solutions at the university tech fair

events.title: Hackathon Participation
events.description: Team collaboration on AI-powered solutions at the regional hackathon

events.title: Tree Plantation Drive
events.description: Actively participating in a campus-wide tree plantation drive to promote environmental sustainability and community engagement.

events.title: Pedal for Planet
events.description: Participated in the 'Pedal for Planet' cycling event to raise awareness about environmental issues and promote sustainable transportation.

events.title: VBD Volunteers Meetup & Great Kindness Day
events.description: Join the Great Kindness Day celebration and volunteer meetup with the VBD (Volunteer for Bangladesh) team to discuss social impact projects.

events.title: Machine Learning Session - RUET Computing Society
events.description: Instructional session on Machine Learning and AI conducted for the RUET Computing Society, focusing on real-world applications and engineering fundamentals.

events.title: Members Orientation - RUET Computing Society
events.description: Presided over the Members Orientation program for the RUET Computing Society. Welcomed new members and shared the vision for technological growth and community building specialized in programming and AI.
